qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Permissive CORS on the unauthenticated REST API allows cross-origin disclosure of process telemetry
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding reaches the same no-password REST router branch in glances_restful_api.py and the same sensitive /api/4/processlist and /api/4/all disclosure path described by the advisory; the CORS condition is additional delivery logic, not a different root cause.

selected_finding.title: Permissive CORS on the unauthenticated REST API allows cross-origin disclosure of process telemetry

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding identifies the advisory's actual missing-authentication root cause on the Glances REST API and the copied PoC reproduced unauthorized disclosure of live process telemetry from /api/4/processlist.
evidence: The advisory JSON describes the same no-password initialization and unauthenticated APIRouter branch in glances/outputs/glances_restful_api.py that the finding cites, along with exposure of process cmdline data from the REST API.
The finding report ties its exploit path to the unauthenticated /api/4/processlist and /api/4/all endpoints and cites the same router branch in glances_restful_api.py rather than a separate sink.

The copied PoC run at /Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-DryRun/advisory_56a2cf29/.judge/poc_runs/cors_rest_api_cross_origin_info_disclosure/run.log shows a successful unauthenticated read of /api/4/processlist with process_count=3, leaked_username=root, and leaked_cmdline=/tmp/glances-venv/bin/python -m glances -w --disable-webui --disable-autodiscover -p 61280.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC cloned vulnerable commit 1f5aead12c368a477fb89647da30c610105de3ca, started Glances in web mode without a password, and retrieved a non-empty /api/4/processlist response containing username and cmdline fields; run.log records access_control_allow_origin=*, leaked_username=root, and the returned Glances process command line.
